title: Scenario Planning in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger scenario planning in practice judgment so finance work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Scenario Planning in Practice is a leverage point inside finance. It supports the broader goal of cash flow, runway, margins, pricing, and unit economics.
coreConcepts: Scenario Planning in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good scenario planning in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Scenario Planning in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
